title: Stainless Steel Copper Bottom Kadai Cooking Wok Copper Karahi 1 Liters/15 cm for Deep Frying/Sauteing/Stir-Fry
features: Material- Made of high quality stainless steel, ensuring superior heat conductivity and lasting durability.
Copper Bottom: The bottom of the kadai is made with copper material, which helps to evenly distribute heat for better cooking performance.
Ergonomic Design: This kadai features an ergonomic design, with a wide base and long handles for easy maneuvering and comfortable grip.
Versatile Use: The kadai is perfect for cooking a variety of dishes, from curries to deep frying.
description: Copper bottom ensures longer heat retention to make the dish absolutely amazing.
